title: Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory
description: Lawrence Livermore National Lab is an involved member of the community, supporting a variety of educational programs, economic development initiatives and charitable activities. Learn more about our commitment to being an involved neighbor.
text:
Invested in Community- engaged Research
For 70 years, Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory (LLNL) has conducted research in the public interest. We are uniquely positioned — physically and culturally — between California’s Silicon Valley and Central Valley, contributing to the state’s dynamic economy and helping to tackle some of its toughest problems.
From engaging with the next generation of Livermore employees through STEM programming to supporting our neighbors through charitable giving to leveraging our expertise in pursuit of renewable energy and carbon neutrality, we are a proud and involved member of our local community.
